createShipment(address,string,string,str.notice: Create a new shipment (Sender role only)

getActorShipments(address).notice: Get all shipment IDs involving an actor (as sender or recipient)

getShipmentCheckpoints(uint256).notice: Get all checkpoints for a shipment

getShipmentIncidents(uint256).notice: Get all incidents for a shipment

recordCheckpoint(uint256,string,string,s.notice: Record a checkpoint for a shipment

registerActor(string,uint8,string).notice: Register as an actor in the system. Awaits admin approval.

reportIncident(uint256,uint8,string).notice: Report an incident on a shipment

resolveIncident(uint256).notice: Resolve an incident (admin or original reporter)

verifyTemperatureCompliance(uint256).notice: Returns false if any TempViolation incident exists for this shipment
